functionality: Displays comprehensive details for a specific invoice, including invoice number, issue/due dates, client and provider information, line items (services), total amounts, payment status, and applied payments. Allows actions like adding a payment to this invoice or exporting/downloading the invoice.

endpoints.purpose: Fetch all details for a specific invoice.
endpoints.responseData: A single Invoice object including related Client, Clinician, ClientGroup (if applicable), Appointment (and its PracticeService details), and a list of Payments applied to this invoice.

endpoints.purpose: Export/Download the specific invoice, typically as a PDF.
endpoints.requestBody: Path parameter: invoiceId. Query parameters: format ('pdf').
endpoints.responseData: File stream (e.g., PDF of the invoice).

queries: Fetch a single Invoice by its ID, including all related data: Client information, Clinician details, ClientGroup (if any), associated Appointment (with service description from PracticeService), and a list of all Payments made towards this invoice.

suggestedComponents: DescriptionList (for key-value pairs of invoice metadata)
interactions: View all static invoice details (client, provider, dates, amounts, status).
View list of services/line items with descriptions and costs.
View history of payments applied to this invoice.
Trigger 'Add Payment' action (could open the 'Add Payment' modal pre-filled for this invoice).
